gigapan.description:
Another low cost macro capture.

This shows the deep need for me to get chdk working so I can do focus stacking.  In places this looks almost abstract, but it is because I picked different things to focus on in the different shots (most of the images were manual focus).

(another warm up for the Nearby Nature Gigablitz)
